2021-22 Valparaiso Beacons Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 14-18 (6-12, 7th in MVC MBB)

Coach: Matt Lottich

PS/G: 70.8 (181st of 358)

PA/G: 70.5 (218th of 358)

SRS: -1.61 (180th of 358)

SOS: 0.83 (128th of 358)

ORtg: 101.8 (196th of 358)

DRtg: 101.5 (206th of 358)

Preseason Odds: Championship +100000
